summary: Russian operators of the "Rubikon" Center conducted combat operations on March 12 and 13, 2026, in Donbas, the Sumy direction, and near Krasny Liman, destroying 111 and 132 targets respectively, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and personnel. The "Yolka" air defense drone system performed kinetic intercepts of Ukrainian fixed-wing attack UAVs in the special military operation zone. Ukrainian forces are deploying increasing numbers of multirotor drones, including Mavic, Autel, and Matrice models, and using FPV drones for anti-personnel strikes, including targeting Russian soldiers on horseback and in fortified positions. Saudi Aramco is reportedly negotiating with Ukrainian manufacturers to purchase interceptor drones and electronic warfare systems for oil field protection.
